case_title: PARTIDA, JOSE R. VS SAN FRANCISCO POLICE DEFT. (ATTN. T. DEMPSEY)

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $801.35 FILED BY PARTIDA, JOSE R. AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO POLICE DEFT. (ATTN. T. DEMPSEY) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-21-2000 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO POLICE DEFT. (ATTN. T. DEMPSEY)
DEFT'S REQUEST FOR CONTINUANCE SENT TO JUDGE FOR SIGNATURE. FEE EXEMPT.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JAN-21-2000, CONTINUED BY COURT TO FEB-25-2000 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
DEFENDANT FILING ORDERED CONTINUANCE FOR 24-MAR-00 AT 10:00 A.M. EXEMPT.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION FEB-25-2000, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO MAR-24-2000 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PARTIDA, JOSE R. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO POLICE DEFT. (ATTN. T. DEMPSEY) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PLTF FILING FOR MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION, PAID $ 10 CASH. TOLD TO WAIT AT LEAST 15 DAYS.
PLFT'S REQUEST TO CORRECT OR VACATE JUDGMENT; DENIED BY COMMISSIONER. NOTICED SENT TO PLFT AND DEFT.
